summary: Phase 3 testing for Pink Lantern platform completed. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major Phase 3 features working. Fixed 1 bug in SearchFilters.js (SelectItem empty value causing runtime error).
passed_tests: ✅ Backend API: GET /api/premium-packages returns all 6 packages with correct prices
✅ Backend API: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session creates real Stripe checkout URL
✅ Backend API: GET /api/stripe/checkout-status/{session_id} returns transaction status
✅ Backend API: POST /api/auth/register with role=escort creates user with email_verified=false
✅ Backend API: POST /api/auth/register with role=client creates user with email_verified=true
✅ Backend API: POST /api/auth/verify-email?token=xxx validates/rejects tokens correctly
✅ Backend API: POST /api/auth/resend-verification requires auth (401)
✅ Backend API: GET /api/auth/login-captcha-status returns captcha_required status
✅ Backend API: Unverified escort cannot create listings (403 error)
✅ Backend API: POST /api/contact stores contact form submission
✅ Backend API: GET /api/listings with geo params returns listings sorted by distance with distance_km
✅ Backend API: GET /api/admin/payments returns payment transactions list
✅ Backend API: Admin stats include total_revenue and total_payments
✅ Backend API: Turnstile CAPTCHA validation on registration
✅ Frontend: /privacy-policy page renders with all legal sections
✅ Frontend: /about page renders with About, How It Works, Contact sections
✅ Frontend: Contact form on /about page submits successfully
✅ Frontend: /register page shows Turnstile CAPTCHA widget (test mode - always passes)
✅ Frontend: /login page works with Turnstile support for failed attempts
✅ Frontend: Escort dashboard premium upgrade dialog shows package prices and Stripe integration
✅ Frontend: /payment-success page renders payment status (processing/success/failed)
✅ Frontend: /verify-email page handles email verification tokens
✅ Frontend: Footer has links to Privacy Policy and About pages
✅ Frontend: Search filters include distance search with 'Use my location' button
✅ Frontend: Radius dropdown in filters working (after fix)
✅ Frontend: Language switcher works on About page (EN/FR/ZH)
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard has Payments tab showing payment transactions
✅ Frontend: Admin stats show Total Revenue and Payments metrics

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value ('') causing React runtime error
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='all' for the radius dropdown 'All' option

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from Phase 2. Payment transactions created during test checkout session tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 features verified working. Age gate bypass: set localStorage 'pl_age_verified' to 'true'. Stripe payment is REAL (test mode) via emergentintegrations library - checkout sessions create real Stripe test URLs. Turnstile CAPTCHA uses test keys (always passes). Email verification: RESEND_API_KEY is empty so emails are logged to console. Geo search works with user_lat, user_lng, radius params. Privacy Policy and About pages multilingual (EN/FR/ZH).

phase_3_features_summary.stripe_payment: REAL (test mode) - creates actual Stripe checkout sessions
phase_3_features_summary.email_verification: Working - escorts must verify email to create listings
phase_3_features_summary.turnstile_captcha: Working - uses test keys that always pass
phase_3_features_summary.geo_search: Working - returns listings sorted by distance with distance_km field
phase_3_features_summary.privacy_policy_page: Working - all legal sections in EN/FR/ZH
phase_3_features_summary.about_contact_page: Working - contact form saves to MongoDB

mocked_apis.note: RESEND_API_KEY is empty - verification emails logged to console instead of sent. Turnstile uses test keys that always pass.
mocked_apis.stripe_status: REAL (test mode) - actual Stripe checkout sessions
